title: mariscus alpinus
intro: Mariscus alpinus, also known as cotton grass, is a type of sedge plant found in wetlands and mountainous regions. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its high mucilage content. The health benefits of Mariscus alpinus include its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which can help to soothe and clear the airways, making it an effective natural remedy for respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and syrups to harness its medicinal properties.
